name: humanizer
tagline: Popular ClawHub skill (700★): strips AI-generated tells from text to give writing a more natural human voice.
verdict: Clean text-only transformation — no network calls, no secret access, no code execution anywhere. Its only weakness is not saying when NOT to use it, so it could get invoked on writing tasks it wasn't meant for.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope guidance — could misfire on adjacent writing tasks.
Pure text transformation — no network, secret access, or code execution anywhere (security is n/a or pass throughout).
